proposal_summary: Updates DNSSECImpl's algorithm 7 (RSASHA1-NSEC3-SHA1) to point to the patched RSASHA1Algorithm contract to fix a padding validation vulnerability, matching the configuration of algorithm 5.

disclosed_entities.name: DNSSECImpl
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: A single setAlgorithm call on DNSSECImpl (0x0fc3152971714E5ed7723FAFa650F86A4BaF30C5)

disclosed_entities.name: pre-patch contract
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: Algorithm 7 currently still points to the pre-patch contract at 0x6ca8624Bc207F043D140125486De0f7E624e37A1

disclosed_addresses.textual_evidence: A single setAlgorithm call on DNSSECImpl (0x0fc3152971714E5ed7723FAFa650F86A4BaF30C5)

claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Updates the address for algorithm 7 in DNSSECImpl to the patched RSASHA1Algorithm contract.
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: A single setAlgorithm call on DNSSECImpl ... setAlgorithm(uint8,address) | 7, 0x58E0383E21f25DaB957F6664240445A514E9f5e8

claimed_complexity.reason: The proposal requires only a single state-changing transaction on an existing contract and reuses an already deployed patched contract.
claimed_complexity.textual_evidence: A single setAlgorithm call on DNSSECImpl ... No new contract deployment is needed — this reuses the same patched contract already serving algorithm 5.
